definition: Personal appearance, general character and fortune.
Brothers, sisters, cousins, short journeys, letters, documents and other writings, books, education.
Dwelling-place, house and home, property in lands or houses, domestic life, the parents.
Affairs of the heart, pleasure, adventure, love-affairs, children, speculation.
Servants (domestic or business), employment under others, small animals and pets, health and sickness, work as is connected with medicine and nursing.
Adjustments of all kinds, marriage and partnerships, legal matters, open enemies.
Death, great changes, wills and legacies, financial affairs of business or marriage partners, warfare, surgery, practical occult forces.

Long journeys (actual travels or quest for knowledge), affairs in distant countries, religion, churches, philosophy, higher education, publications, dreams and mystical experiences, brothers-and-sisters-in-law.
Occupation, worldly standing and ambitions, employers, masters and superiors.
Associates, friends, acquaintances, company, hopes and fears, wishes and aspirations, gain or loss through acquaintances and friends.
Sympathy, charity, help given and received, private and secret matters, psychical experiences, limitations, restraint, hidden enemies.
